utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with detailed information for each. 'Health_coverage' specifies both physical and mental coverage types, features, coverage limit, and cost. 'Property_coverage' includes type, features, and cost. 'Travel_coverage' includes type, features, and cost. 'Additional_services' lists features and additional fees. 'Total_budget' provides both monthly and annual costs. All items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage (physical + mental), property_coverage (home/contents), travel_coverage (international family plan), and additional_services (telemedicine, wellness programs, multilingual 24/7 support, priority claims, mobile app access). To map these to ratings, we align each to the corresponding ground-truth category. For health coverage (physical + mental), the top-rated matching options are PrimeCare Premium Plan or EliteCare Premium Plan, both rated 10. For property coverage (home/contents), the corresponding premium options are PrimeHome Premium Coverage or EliteHome Premium Coverage, both rated 10. For travel coverage (international family plan), the best matches are PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan, both rated 10. For additional services, 'telemedicine' and 'wellness programs' correspond to Telemedicine Services (rating 9) and Wellness Programs (rating 9). 'Priority claims' corresponds to the general service Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10), which includes priority claims processing. Therefore, the assistant’s selections align to ratings 10, 10, 10, 9, 9, and 10 respectively.
